posts.author: SecureUser_84
posts.text: Hey everyone, I've just found a suspicious message claiming to be from 'Amazon Support'. It says my account has been compromised and asks me to verify my password and credit card details immediately via this link [link removed]. Please ignore it! #Phishing #StaySafe
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive login credentials and financial information, which is a clear sign of a phishing scam that must be removed.
